overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city district. The camera moves from Eden Plaza past neon-lit streets with futuristic traffic, up stairs to an elevated pedestrian area with digital billboards, and back down to street level. Wet reflective surfaces and dense neon signage create a characteristic cyberpunk atmosphere with green and magenta lighting.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at Eden Plaza entrance where crowds of NPCs stand with raised hands. The camera walks forward through the plaza past palm trees and tiled flooring, transitioning toward the street where a bus shelter becomes visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Moving along the street sidewalk, the camera passes a modern bus shelter while futuristic sports cars drive past on the wet asphalt. The large Kiroshi Optical billboard dominates the view ahead, reflecting off the rain-soaked road surface.

events.description: approaching staircase leading to upper plaza level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow sidewalk beside a modern building facade, passing close to the massive Kiroshi Optical billboard. The street level gives way to an approaching staircase leading to an upper plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with digital art installations and palm trees

descending stairs on opposite side back toward street level

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends concrete stairs to an elevated pedestrian plaza featuring geometric concrete planters with integrated lighting and palm trees. After passing digital advertising screens and a large pink billboard, the camera descends stairs on the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level sidewalk with neon-lit commercial buildings and overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along street level sidewalk passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two people standing against wall conversing

entered.detail: modern building with glass walkway connecting structures above the street
wet multi-lane street with moving traffic and neon reflections

segments.scene_description: Back at street level, the camera continues along the sidewalk past pedestrians standing against the wall. An elevated glass walkway connects modern buildings overhead while futuristic cars drive on the wet road below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crowded public plaza through a neon-drenched street and up onto an elevated pedestrian walkway. It begins at the Eden Plaza entrance among crowds of people, moving past palm trees and tiled flooring toward the city street. As the camera reaches the sidewalk, it passes a modern bus shelter and futuristic sports cars gliding over wet asphalt, with the massive Kiroshi Optical billboard reflecting off the rain-soaked road. The scene then shifts from the narrow street level as the camera ascends concrete stairs to an upper plaza filled with geometric planters, integrated lighting, and glowing pink digital advertisements. Finally, the camera descends back to the street, passing pedestrians against a building facade while an elevated glass walkway spans the modern architecture overhead.
